prompt: A fun bubbly kids advertisement poster. An excited young boy age 5 in swimming goggles sits inside a giant rubber duck shaped bubble bath bottle 3x his height overflowing with rainbow bubbles everywhere, "BUBBLEPOP" written in big bouncy letters on the bottle. Bright pastel blue bathroom background with floating rubber ducks soap bubbles and rainbow foam. Big bouncy rounded typography "BUBBLEPOP" in bright blue and yellow filling the background. Tagline bottom: "Bath time just got wild." Small text top-right corner reads "Designed with GPT Image 2" in grey. Photorealistic, fun kids bath product commercial, bright soft bathroom lighting.
